<!--
For implementation listings: add one row to src/data/implementations.ts
and fill in the checklist below. For spec changes: reference the issue
where the change was discussed. For site changes: describe what changed.
-->

## What kind of change is this?

- [ ] Implementation listing (src/data/implementations.ts)
- [ ] Spec or schema change (protocol/)
- [ ] Site or tooling change

## For implementation listings

- Name and role (buyer host / vendor agent):
- Homepage with onboarding documentation:
- Status claimed: `in progress` / `conforming`
- If claiming `conforming` as a buyer host: paste the summary line of a
  harness run from https://aiaagentnetwork.com/conformance against your
  host (all checks passing), and confirm the human approval gate of
  section 8 holds:
- If claiming `conforming` as a vendor agent: confirm your implementation
  passes the published test vectors
  (https://aiaagentnetwork.com/conformance/test-vectors.json):

## For spec changes

- Discussion issue:
- Does this alter bytes on the wire (canonical strings, hashes, required
  fields, endpoints)? If yes, it targets the next protocol version:
